name: Dutch Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch tart or pie pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, and baking powder.
4. Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut in 1 1/2 tablespoons margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Add egg whites, milk, and vanilla; beat until smooth. The batter will be stiff.
6. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly to fit the pan.
7. Arrange apple slices, overlapping, in two concentric circles to cover the batter.
8. In a small bowl, combine 3 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over the apple slices.
9. Dot the top of the apples with 1/2 tablespoon margarine.
10. Bake for 30 minutes.
11. Cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serving size: 8
Calories per serving: 183
Fat per serving: 2g
